seo.title: Building AI Chatbot with Smolagents + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai chatbot with Smolagents + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Chatbot with Smolagents leverages Hugging Face's lightweight framework for simple, code-based agent reasoning, enabling conversational agents with tools and memory. However, its minimalistic design amplifies risks like unsafe code execution, hallucination, and coherence failures in multi-turn interactions. Vex provides essential guardrails to verify response accuracy, safety, and PII protection, ensuring reliable deployment.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Chatbot Architecture with Smolagents
architectureOverview.description:
The typical Smolagents AI Chatbot architecture features an intent classifier routing user queries to specialized agents: a retrieval agent for RAG, a reasoning agent for complex queries, and a response generator. Multi-turn memory is managed via a shared context store, with tools for external API calls and knowledge retrieval. This setup supports dynamic conversations but requires robust error handling for compounding reasoning errors.

Key components include the SmolAgent core with custom tools (e.g., vector DB search, safety checker), a conversation memory buffer, and an LLM backend like Llama or Mistral. The agent loop processes inputs through planning, tool execution, and response synthesis, wrapped in Vex for verification.

This architecture excels in simplicity but exposes failure modes like tool misinterpretation and unsafe code generation, necessitating runtime checks.

risks.name: Unsafe Python Execution
risks.description: Code agent generates malicious or resource-intensive Python code via tools, risking server compromise.
risks.mitigation: Wrap agent.run() with Vex code safety checks and sandbox execution.

risks.name: Tool Misinterpretation
risks.description: Agent misreads tool descriptions, calling wrong APIs or passing invalid params in RAG flows.
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies tool call parameters against schema before execution.

risks.name: Conversation Incoherence
risks.description: Multi-turn memory drift causes context loss, leading to irrelevant or repetitive responses.
risks.mitigation: Vex checks response coherence against conversation history.

risks.name: PII Leakage & Hallucinations
risks.description: Responses expose user PII or fabricate facts without RAG grounding.
risks.mitigation: Vex applies PII redaction and hallucination detection on outputs.

implementation.title: Setup Smolagents Chatbot with Memory
implementation.description: Initialize core chatbot with conversation memory and basic tools.
implementation.code:
from smolagents import CodeAgent, Memory
from vex import verify

memory = Memory(max_messages=20)
chatbot = CodeAgent(
    model="huggingface/llama-3.2-3b-Instruct",
    tools=[],
    memory=memory
)

async def chat(message: str):
    result = await chatbot.run(message)
    return result.content

implementation.title: Add RAG Tool for Knowledge Retrieval
implementation.description: Integrate vector store retrieval tool for grounded responses.

implementation.title: Intent Classification Router
implementation.description: Route queries to specialized agents based on intent.

implementation.title: Multi-turn Response Handler
implementation.description: Process conversation with memory updates and streaming.
implementation.code:
async def handle_message(user_id: str, message: str):
    memory.key = user_id
    response = await chat(message)
    memory.add_user_message(message)
    memory.add_assistant_message(response)
    return response

vexIntegration.title: Wrap agent.run() with Vex Safety Verification
vexIntegration.description: Protect against unsafe code execution and PII leakage.
vexIntegration.code:
import vex

@vex.verify(
    checks=[
        "code_safety",
        "pii_redaction",
        "no_exec"
    ]
)
async def safe_chat(message: str):
    result = await chatbot.run(message)
    return result.content

# Usage
response = await safe_chat("What's my account number?")

vexIntegration.title: Verify Response Accuracy & Hallucination
vexIntegration.description: Ensure factual grounding and RAG alignment.
vexIntegration.code:
@vex.verify(
    checks=[
        "factual_consistency",
        "hallucination_detection",
        "rag_grounding"
    ],
    reference_docs=docs  # From retrieval
)
async def verified_rag_response(query: str):
    docs = await retrieve_docs(query)
    result = await rag_agent.run(query)
    return result.content, docs

vexIntegration.title: Coherence Check for Multi-turn Conversations
vexIntegration.description: Maintain conversation flow and context awareness.
vexIntegration.code:
@vex.verify(
    checks=[
        "conversation_coherence",
        "context_retention",
        "response_relevance"
    ],
    history=memory.get_history()
)
async def coherent_chat(user_id: str, message: str):
    memory.key = user_id
    response = await chatbot.run(message)
    memory.add_messages(message, response)
    return response
